description: Sharing dining experiences with location details, menu items, and pricing to showcase restaurant offerings and create authentic customer testimonials.
structural_recipe: Post restaurant visit content including: restaurant name and location (full address or district), tagged food photography credit, itemized menu offerings with prices in SAR, dish names in both English and Arabic transliteration. Structure as multi-line captions separating restaurant info, photography credit, and pricing breakdown. Include Arabic-English bilingual presentation to maximize accessibility.
why_it_works: Saudi audiences trust peer recommendations and transparent pricing information. Bilingual menu details with exact pricing removes purchase friction and builds credibility. Location specificity enables local discoverability. Tagging photography source adds authenticity and encourages user-generated content participation within community networks.
transplantation_caveats: Pricing sensitivity: SAR amounts must reflect local market rates to maintain credibility
Bilingual requirement: Arabic-English format is essential for Saudi audience penetration
Location specificity: Must include recognized Riyadh landmarks or official addresses for relevance
Halal/dietary considerations: Menu descriptions should align with local food culture expectations
cultural_constraints: Must use respectful Arabic transliteration for international dish names
Photography credits indicate community-driven content culture
